overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a wizard character in a green robe and pointed hat exploring the medieval village of Hogsmeade. The character walks along cobblestone streets past timber-framed buildings and NPC villagers, eventually entering the Three Broomsticks tavern.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village street with timber-framed shops

agents.ego_description: walking down stone steps into the village street, passing wooden benches and stone cottages

notable_agents.action: group of villagers sitting on a wooden bench conversing near a firewood stack

entered.detail: weathered stone wall with small windows and wooden shutters
traditional half-timbered structure with white plaster and dark wooden beams
simple wooden bench where villagers are seated
neatly stacked logs of firewood beside a building entrance
clotheslines with fabric strung between buildings overhead

segments.scene_description: The character descends stone steps into a narrow cobblestone street lined with timber-framed medieval buildings. Villagers sit on a wooden bench to the right near a stack of firewood, while hanging laundry stretches overhead between the stone cottages.

scene_state.functional_zone: village street with merchant cart and tool racks

events.description: passing a wooden merchant cart with canvas canopy displaying goods on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street, glancing at a merchant cart and passing buildings with tools outside

notable_agents.action: child in purple clothing running ahead down the street

entered.detail: wooden pushcart with white canvas cover and hanging merchandise
stone staircase leading up to a higher level of the village
wooden rack holding brooms and farming tools outside a cottage door

segments.scene_description: The character walks past a merchant cart with a canvas canopy on the right, where goods are displayed. The street continues with stone cottages featuring tool racks and brooms outside. A child runs ahead in the distance as the character approaches a set of stone stairs on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: central village plaza approaching the Three Broomsticks tavern

events.description: entering the central plaza with the large distinctive tree-shaped tavern building becoming visible ahead
slowing down as approaching the large wooden entrance doors of the Three Broomsticks

agents.ego_description: walking through the central plaza toward the prominent tavern building, passing groups of conversing wizards

notable_agents.action: group of wizards in robes conversing near the tavern entrance
villager in purple robe standing near a stone wall

entered.detail: large distinctive building with gnarled wooden supports resembling tree roots and stone walls
stone planters with white and purple flowers along the wall
decorative lights strung across the plaza between buildings
low stone wall topped with flowering plants

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide central plaza where the iconic Three Broomsticks tavern dominates the view with its unique tree-root architecture. The character walks past flower beds and string lights overhead, approaching groups of conversing wizards near the tavern's large wooden entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior of the Three Broomsticks tavern with wooden beams and fireplace

events.description: opening the large arched wooden door and stepping into the dimly lit tavern interior
interior lighting reveals the central fireplace and upper balcony as eyes adjust

agents.ego_description: entering the tavern and walking toward the central hearth, observing the interior layout

notable_agents.action: patrons sitting at wooden tables drinking and conversing near the wall

entered.detail: large arched wooden door with iron hinges and stone frame
exposed dark wooden support beams crossing the ceiling
large stone fireplace with burning fire at the far end of the room
upper wooden balcony with railing overlooking the main floor
wooden sign with text 'The Three Broomsticks' above the balcony
iron chandelier with candles hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character opens the heavy wooden door and enters the Three Broomsticks tavern, transitioning from the overcast village to the warm interior lit by fireplace and chandeliers. The space features high wooden beams, an upper balcony with the tavern sign, and patrons seated at tables drinking and conversing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the narrow, overcast streets of a medieval village into the warm, glowing interior of a bustling tavern. It begins as the character descends stone steps into a tight cobblestone alley lined with timber-framed cottages, passing villagers on wooden benches and laundry hanging overhead. As the character advances, the path opens past a merchant's canvas canopy and tool-laden cottages before turning toward a set of stone stairs. The scene then expands into a wide central plaza dominated by the tree-root architecture of the Three Broomsticks, moving past flower beds and string lights toward groups of conversing wizards. Finally, the camera follows the character through the heavy wooden doors, transitioning from the gray exterior to a cozy indoor space filled with high wooden beams, chandeliers, and patrons gathered around fireplaces.
